landmarks.name: Jaffna Peninsula
landmarks.description: The northern cultural hub featuring the historic Jaffna Fort and Nallur Kandaswamy Kovil.

landmarks.name: Anuradhapura Sacred City
landmarks.description: The first ancient capital of Sri Lanka, home to the Great Ruwanwelisaya Stupa.

landmarks.name: Sigiriya Rock Fortress
landmarks.description: The 5th-century 'Lion Rock' fortress, known for its sky-palace and ancient frescoes.

landmarks.name: Polonnaruwa Ruins
landmarks.description: Medieval capital featuring the Gal Vihara rock-cut Buddha statues.

landmarks.name: Kandy (Temple of the Tooth)
landmarks.description: The hilltop capital housing the sacred relic of the tooth of the Buddha.

landmarks.name: Nuwara Eliya & Ella
landmarks.description: The misty tea country featuring Nine Arch Bridge and World's End.

landmarks.name: Yala National Park
landmarks.description: Renowned for the highest density of leopards in the world.

landmarks.name: Galle Fort
landmarks.description: A 16th-century Portuguese and Dutch fortification still bustling with life.

landmarks.name: Colombo
landmarks.description: The bustling economic capital, featuring the Lotus Tower and Galle Face Green.
